## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CigaretteOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CigaretteOff { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
smoking, no-smoking

## Categories
travel, transportation, medical

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/cigarette-off)
